blocks.text:
4. Processing Pipeline at a Glance
A typical pipeline renders each PDF page to an image, detects layout blocks, recognizes the text inside each block, and finally reassembles everything into a structured, machine-readable output.

5. Example Volume Estimates
The table below shows illustrative processing volumes for a mid-sized digitization project.

| Document type | Pages per month | Average pages per file |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Invoices | 12,000 | 2 |
| Contracts | 3,500 | 14 |
| Application forms | 9,000 | 3 |
| Archived reports | 1,800 | 40 |

6. Summary
Reliable OCR turns static page images into text, layout, and geometry that downstream software can reason about. When evaluating a system, check recognition accuracy, layout fidelity, reading-order quality, and throughput on your own representative documents.
